rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component type scopes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings
Component type annexes are for structural contracts; implementation annexes are for deployment bindings
generic_rules: Preserve AADL component structure and scope rules during AGREE annex insertion
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE contracts
Do not reference AADL properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Assumptions and guarantees should reference component ports in valid component type scopes
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
AADL property associations and their mapping to AGREE variables
